body:
```
Chakra UI / JSX migration

The issue's strategic ask (migrate to chakra-ui.com + JSX, reuse shared components)
is documented as a staged, multi-PR migration in the case study's
[solution-plans.md](https://github.com/link-assistant/hive-mind/blob/issue-1963-d2c252441bed/docs/case-studies/issue-1963/solution-plans.md),
not executed here: the app currently ships raw React.createElement with committed
bundles guarded by a git diff --exit-code CI gate, so a JSX/Chakra transition is a
large infra change that should not ride with five cosmetic fixes. These fixes are
written token-ready (consolidated selectors, both theme layers) so the migration —
which starts with introducing CSS design tokens to remove the duplication root
cause — can absorb them cleanly.
```

It is not multi PR, we do it in this PR, it is not too much work. And must be done to drastically reduce possible errors in increase quality to highest standards.

Also we need to make sure we incorporated all findings and details from https://github.com/link-assistant/hive-mind/pull/1964, so we can close this pull request in other repository, which I created by mistake placing issue in wrong repository.

Nothing can be deferred or delayed to other pull requests, all changes must be fully done in this pull request, and close all our requirements in widest and broadest sense possible (affecting the entire codebase).
